column1: Luis Arraez headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks with a rock-solid 72.2% hit probability, batting second on the road with a sweet platoon edge against Cade Cavalli. Shohei Ohtani isn’t far behind, leading off in a hitter’s haven at Colorado, also with the platoon advantage and a juicy park boost that makes his elite bat even scarier. Trea Turner and Freddie Freeman both bring reliable profiles and strong matchups, but Arraez and Ohtani are the clear top dogs for streakers chasing safety and upside.
